Proteomics_Participant_ID: Unique identifier for each participant in the proteomics study.
Case_excluded: Indicator if the case was excluded from analysis (No/Yes).
Proteomics_TMT_batch: Batch number for TMT (Tandem Mass Tag) labeling.
Proteomics_TMT_plex: Number of plexes (multiplexes) in TMT labeling.
Proteomics_TMT_channel: Specific channel used in TMT labeling.
Proteomics_Parent_Sample_IDs: Parent sample IDs associated with the proteomics samples.
Proteomics_Aliquot_ID: Unique identifier for each aliquot sample.
Proteomics_Tumor_Normal: Indicator if the sample is from a tumor or normal tissue.
Proteomics_OCT: Indicator if OCT (optical coherence tomography) was used (No/Yes).
Country: Country of origin for the patient (all samples are from the United States).
Histologic_Grade_FIGO: Histologic grade of the tumor according to the FIGO system.
Myometrial_invasion_Specify: Depth of myometrial invasion by the tumor, specified as a percentage.
Histologic_type: Histologic subtype of the tumor (all samples are endometrioid).
Treatment_naive: Indicates if the patient has not received any prior treatment.
Tumor_purity: Purity level of the tumor sample.
Path_Stage_Primary_Tumor-pT: Pathological stage of the primary tumor according to the FIGO system.
Path_Stage_Reg_Lymph_Nodes-pN: Pathological stage indicating involvement of regional lymph nodes.
Clin_Stage_Dist_Mets-cM: Clinical stage indicating the presence of distant metastases.
Path_Stage_Dist_Mets-pM: Pathological stage indicating the presence of distant metastases (incomplete staging).
FIGO_stage: FIGO staging system for gynecological cancers (IA).
LVSI: Lymphovascular space involvement (1.0 for yes, 0.0 for no).
Tumor_Site: Location of tumor within the endometrium.
Tumor_Site_Other: Description of tumor location within the endometrium.
Tumor_Focality: Indicates if the tumor is unifocal (single site) or multifocal.
Tumor_Size_cm: Size of the tumor in centimeters.
Estrogen_Receptor: Estrogen receptor status of the tumor tissue.
Estrogen_Receptor_%: Percentage of tumor cells expressing estrogen receptors.
Progesterone_Receptor: Progesterone receptor status of the tumor tissue.
Progesterone_Receptor_%: Percentage of tumor cells expressing progesterone receptors.
MLH1: Expression status of MLH1 protein in tumor cells.
MLH2: Expression status of MLH2 protein in tumor cells.
MSH6: Expression status of MSH6 protein in tumor cells.
PMS2: Status of PMS2 protein nuclear expression in cells.
p53: Status of p53 protein expression, often undetermined.
Other_IHC_specify: Additional immunohistochemistry results not covered by other columns.
MLH1_Promoter_Hypermethylation: Status of MLH1 promoter hypermethylation, often undetermined.
Num_full_term_pregnancies: Number of full-term pregnancies reported by the individual.
EPIC_Bcells: Proportion of B-cells in the sample as per EPIC analysis.
EPIC_CAFs: Proportion of Cancer-Associated Fibroblasts in the sample as per EPIC analysis.
EPIC_CD4_Tcells: Proportion of CD4 T-cells in the sample as per EPIC analysis.
EPIC_CD8_Tcells: Proportion of CD8 T-cells in the sample as per EPIC analysis.
EPIC_Endothelial: Proportion of endothelial cells in the sample as per EPIC analysis.
EPIC_Macrophages: Proportion of macrophages in the sample.
EPIC_NKcells: Proportion of NK cells in the sample.
EPIC_otherCells: Proportion of other immune cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_B_cells_naive: Proportion of naive B cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_B_cells_memory: Proportion of memory B cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Plasma_cells: Proportion of plasma cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T_cells_CD8: Proportion of CD8 T cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T_cells_CD4_naive: Proportion of naive CD4 T cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T_cells_CD4_memory_resting: Proportion of resting memory CD4 T cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T_cells_CD4_memory_activated: Proportion of activated memory CD4 T cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T _cells _follicular _helper: Proportion of follicular helper T cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T _cells _regulatory _(Tregs): Proportion of regulatory T cells (Tregs) in the sample.
CIBERSORT_T _cells _gamma _delta: Proportion of gamma delta T cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_NK _cells _resting: Proportion of resting NK cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_NK _cells _activated: Proportion of activated NK cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Monocytes: Proportion of monocytes in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Macrophages _M0: Proportion of M0 macrophages in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Macrophages _M1: Proportion of M1 macrophages in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Macrophages _M2: Proportion of M2 macrophages in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Dendritic _cells _resting: Proportion of resting dendritic cells in the sample.
CIBERSORT_Dendritic _cells _activated: Proportion of activated dendritic cells inferred by CIBERSORT algorithm.
CIBERSORT_Mast _cells _resting: Proportion of resting mast cells inferred by CIBERSORT algorithm.
CIBERSORT_Mast _cells _activated: Proportion of activated mast cells inferred by CIBERSORT algorithm.
CIBERSORT_Eosinophils: Proportion of eosinophils inferred by CIBERSORT algorithm.
CIBERSORT_Neutrophils: Proportion of neutrophils inferred by CIBERSORT algorithm.
CIBERSORT_Absolute _score: Absolute score indicating confidence of CIBERSORT analysis.
ESTIMATE_StromalScore: Score indicating stromal content in the sample.
ESTIMATE_ImmuneScore: Score indicating immune cell content in the sample.
ESTIMATE_ESTIMATEScore: Overall ESTIMATE score combining stromal and immune scores.
Stemness_score: Score indicating stemness or differentiation potential of cells.
ER_ESR1: Relative expression level of ESR1 gene.
PR_PGR: Relative expression level of PGR gene.
Pathway_activity_EGFR: Activity level of EGFR signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_Hypoxia: Activity level of hypoxia signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_JAK.STAT: Activity level of JAK-STAT signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_MAPK: Activity level of MAPK signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_NFkB: Activity level of NF-kB signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_PI3K: Activity level of PI3K signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_TGFb: Activity level of TGF-beta signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_TNFa: Activity level of TNF-alpha signaling pathway.
Pathway_activity_Trail: Activity score for Trail pathway; likely a measure of pathway activation or inhibition.
Pathway_activity_VEGF: Activity score for VEGF pathway; indicates level of pathway activation or inhibition.
Pathway_activity_p53: Activity score for p53 pathway; measures pathway activation or inhibition.
TP53_ATM: Binary indicator for ATM interaction with TP53; 0.0 suggests no interaction.
TP53_CHEK2: Binary indicator for CHEK2 interaction with TP53; 0.0 suggests no interaction.
TP53_MDM4: Binary indicator for MDM4 interaction with TP53; 0.0 suggests no interaction.
TP53_RPS6KA3: Binary indicator for RPS6KA3 interaction with TP53; 0.0 suggests no interaction.
TP53_TP53: Binary indicator for TP53 self-interaction; 1.0 indicates presence of interaction.
TP53_pathway: Binary indicator for TP53 pathway activation; 1.0 indicates pathway is active.
PI3K_AKT1: Binary indicator for AKT1 interaction with PI3K; 0.0 suggests no interaction.
PI3K_AKT2: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_AKT3: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_DEPDC5: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_DEPTOR: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_INPP4B: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_MAPKAP1: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_MLST8: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_MTOR: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_NPRL2: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level, shows variability.
PI3K_NPRL3: Uncertain, possibly related to PI3K pathway activity or expression level.
PI3K_PDK1: Uncertain, possibly binary status of PDK1 involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_PIK3CA: Binary status indicating presence or absence of PIK3CA in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_PIK3CB: Uncertain, possibly binary status of PIK3CB involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_PIK3R1: Uncertain, possibly binary status of PIK3R1 involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_PIK3R2: Uncertain, possibly binary status of PIK3R2 involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_PPP2R1A: Binary status indicating presence or absence of PPP2R1A in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_PTEN: Binary status indicating presence or absence of PTEN in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_RHEB: Uncertain, possibly binary status of RHEB involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_RICTOR: Uncertain, possibly binary status of RICTOR involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_RPS6: Uncertain, possibly binary status of RPS6 involvement in PI3K pathway.
PI3K_RPS6KB1: PI3K pathway interaction with RPS6KB1, binary indicator.
PI3K_RPTOR: PI3K pathway interaction with RPTOR, binary indicator.
PI3K_STK11: PI3K pathway interaction with STK11, binary indicator.
PI3K_TSC1: PI3K pathway interaction with TSC1, binary indicator.
PI3K_TSC2: PI3K pathway interaction with TSC2, binary indicator.
PI3K_pathway: Overall PI3K pathway activation status, binary indicator.
HRD_BRCA1: Homologous recombination deficiency in BRCA1, binary indicator.
HRD_BRCA2: Homologous recombination deficiency in BRCA2, binary indicator.
HRD_BRCA1_or_BRCA2: HRD in BRCA1 or BRCA2, binary indicator.
CNV_DEL: Copy number variation deletion event frequency.
CNV_AMP: Amplification level of genetic material, likely a ratio or percentage.
CNV_class: Classification of CNV (Copy Number Variation) level, consistently low in samples.
CNV_idx: Index or score related to CNV, possibly a measure of variation or significance.
CNV_1q_DEL: Copy number deletion on chromosome 1q, negative values indicate loss.
CNV_3q_DEL: Copy number deletion on chromosome 3q, negative values indicate loss.
CNV_4q_DEL: Copy number deletion on chromosome 4q, negative values indicate loss.
CNV_1q_AMP: Copy number amplification on chromosome 1q, positive values indicate gain.
CNV_3q_AMP: Copy number amplification on chromosome 3q, positive values indicate gain.
CNV_4q_AMP: Copy number amplification on chromosome 4q, positive values indicate gain.
Purity_Immune: Immune cell purity or contamination level in the sample.
Purity_Cancer: Proportion of cancer cell purity in the sample.
Purity_Stroma: Proportion of stromal cell purity in the sample.
MSI_status: Microsatellite instability status of the sample (MSI-H or MSS).
POLE_subtype: POLE mutation status in the sample (No indicates absence).
JAK1_MS_INDEL: JAK1 gene mutation status for indel type (WT indicates wild type).
JAK1_Mutation: Overall JAK1 gene mutation status (WT indicates wild type).
Log2_variant_per_Mbp: Log2 ratio of total variants per megabase pair.
Log2_SNP_per_Mbp: Log2 ratio of single nucleotide polymorphisms per megabase pair.
Log2_INDEL_per_Mbp: Log2 ratio of insertions and deletions per megabase pair.
Log2_variant_total: Log2 total count of all variants in the sample.
Log2_SNP_total: Log2 transformed total number of Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms.
Log2_INDEL_total: Log2 transformed total number of Insertions and Deletions.
Genomics_subtype: Genomic subtype classification of the sample.
Mutation_signature_C>A: Contribution of C>A mutation signature to the total mutations.
Mutation_signature_C>G: Contribution of C>G mutation signature to the total mutations.
Mutation_signature_C>T: Contribution of C>T mutation signature to the total mutations.
Mutation_signature_T>C: Contribution of T>C mutation signature to the total mutations.
Mutation_signature_T>A: Contribution of T>A mutation signature to the total mutations.
Mutation_signature_T>G: Contribution of T>G mutation signature to the total mutations.
WXS_normal_sample_type: Type of normal sample used in Whole Exome Sequencing.
WXS_normal_filename: Filename of WXS normal sample BAM file.
WXS_normal_UUID: Unique identifier for WXS normal sample.
WXS_tumor_sample_type: Type of WXS tumor sample, consistently 'Tumor'.
WXS_tumor_filename: Filename of WXS tumor sample BAM file.
WXS_tumor_UUID: Unique identifier for WXS tumor sample.
WGS_normal_sample_type: Type of WGS normal sample, consistently 'Blood_normal'.
WGS_normal_UUID: Unique identifier for WGS normal sample.
WGS_tumor_sample_type: Type of WGS tumor sample, consistently 'Tumor'.
WGS_tumor_UUID: Unique identifier for WGS tumor sample.
RNAseq_R1_sample_type: Type of RNAseq R1 sample, consistently 'Tumor'.
RNAseq_R1_UUID: Unique identifier for RNA sequencing read 1.
RNAseq_R2_sample_type: Sample type (e.g., Tumor) for RNA sequencing read 2.
RNAseq_R2_UUID: Unique identifier for RNA sequencing read 2.
miRNAseq_sample_type: Sample type (e.g., Tumor) for miRNA sequencing.
Methylation_available: Indicates if methylation data is available.
